setup_data.py line 49 - James O'Brien created as res.partner contact with email james.obrien@northbridge.org
setup_task.sh lines 17-18 calculates next Monday using (7 - now.weekday()) % 7 or 7, plus timedelta(days=4) for Friday = 1 week offset

setup_data.py analysis: Alice Johnson appears in events with ev(0-4) date range: Q2 Financial Review (ev(0,10)), Team Standup (ev(0,9)), Marketing Campaign Review (ev(1,14)), Product Roadmap Planning (ev(2,9))
setup_data.py lines 107-166: James O'Brien only appears in Budget Committee Meeting (ev(10,15) - week 2) and Quarterly Business Review (ev(14,9) - week 3), not in next week's meetings with Alice

privileged_info_summary: The batch_add_attendee task operates on synthetic Odoo calendar data. Alice Johnson is a real contact in the database who has 4 scheduled meetings during the target week (next Monday-Friday): Q2 Financial Review (Monday 10am), Team Standup (Monday 9am), Marketing Campaign Review (Tuesday 2pm), and Product Roadmap Planning (Wednesday 9am). James O'Brien is another real contact in the database who is not initially attendee on any of these Alice meetings in the target week. The task requires adding James to all of Alice's target-week meetings without adding him to other meetings.
